title: Deepslate recipes fix
description:
Creates consistency between Deepslate and Stone recipes 
In focus on the bricks recipes
body:
# This pack is discontinued due to changes to the base game to deepslate resipes

### i think there is no point in maintaining this pack since mojang added option to craft deepslate blocks from the deepslate block (the smelted version) in 26.1 currently there are no breaking changes in the recipe system so the last release should still work on 26.1.
## thanks to all of you and check my other packs in my profile

we all know the old good stone bricks recipe 4 stone to 4 bricks
but for some reasone deepslate bricks have to be crafted from the cobbledeepslate what makes the deepslate without any use 

so i decided to make the two recipes into 1 consistant patten

both types of bricks can be made from both cobble and smelted stone types
in crafting table and stonecuter
also i changed the order of deepslate crafting from polished>bricks>tiles 
to bricks>polished>tiles
